mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO student_homework (student_id, homework_id, attachment, review_status, score, rejected_reason,is_deleted, create_time, update_time, submit_time, evaluate_time, delete_time) VALUES
(#{item.studentId}, #{item.homeworkId}, #{item.attachment}, #{item.reviewStatus}, #{item.score}, #{item.rejectedReason}, #{item.isDeleted}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.submitTime}, #{item.evaluateTime}, #{item.deleteTime})
